title: MCA Eases DIR-3 KYC Compliance for Directors: A Quick Update
content:
# MCA Eases DIR-3 KYC Compliance for Directors: A Quick Update

Ek important update hai for all directors! Government ne Companies (Appointment and Qualification of Directors) Rules, 2014 mein significant amendments announce kiye hain, jisse DIR-3 KYC filing process ab aur bhi simplified ho gaya hai. Ye changes March 31, 2026 se effective honge.

Here are the key changes you need to know:

*   **Filing Frequency Reduced:** Earlier, DIR-3 KYC annually file karna hota tha. Ab, directors ko apna Form DIR-3 KYC Web, har teen consecutive financial years mein ek baar hi file karna hoga. This significantly reduces the compliance burden.
*   **New Due Date:** Har teesre financial year mein, DIN holders ko 31st March tak ke liye KYC details 30th June tak submit karni hongi.
*   **Event-Based Updates Mandatory:** Agar aapke personal details jaise ki mobile number, email ID, ya residential address mein koi change hota hai, toh usse change hone ke 30 din ke andar Form DIR-3 KYC Web ke through update karna mandatory hai, along with the prescribed fee.
*   **Unified Form:** Ab Form DIR-3 KYC aur DIR-3 KYC Web ko combine karke ek single unified Form DIR-3 KYC Web introduce kiya gaya hai, making the process more streamlined.

These amendments, notified vide **Notification No. G.S.R. 943(E) dated December 31, 2025**, aim to enhance the ease of doing business by simplifying regulatory requirements and reducing repetitive filings.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://egazette.gov.in/WriteReadData/2025/268970.pdf)

*Published on: 1 April 2026*
